Apr 06 2026 70 mins  

Invincible just reminded everyone why this show is elite.After a shaky Episode 4, Season 4 Episode 5 (“Give Us a Moment”) delivers one of the most brutal, emotional, and important episodes of the entire series.From Nolan’s failed apology… to Mark getting absolutely destroyed by Conquest… this episode flips the season back into full gear.Brandon & Chanel break it all down.💥 The Conquest Fight (INSANE) Conquest ambushes the team mid-flight. And then… Conquest punches a hole through Mark’s body. #Invincible We Was Watching
